channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped horse box full of rubbish, 20th May
item.description:
For over 2 months it's sat there in road.. Full of rubbish.. Dangerous to kids and traffic..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three potholes by previous repairs., 20th May
item.description:
There are three new potholes around previous repairs. One has already caused an accident when an individual stumbled on it while exiting a car. The victim sustained a minor head injury.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderslie Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General waste abandon, 20th May
item.description:
There has been a couple of general waste has been on the corner of the stairs which has been thrown. Someone has opened and throw everywhere basically.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancey Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, possible fly tipping is all over the street blocking it, 20th May
item.description:
Rubbish, possible fly tipping is all over the street blocking it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saddlers Way, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights down, 20th May
item.description:
Traffic lights out Permeant traffic lights Jct with East street and Sherman Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 20th May
item.description:
Yet again this street light is out. It works for a few weeks then stops working. There’s obviously a problem with it that is not being fixed. I’m constantly reporting it, the whole section of road and pavement is in complete darkness. Not good for pedestrian safety and vehicle security
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped matress, 20th May
item.description:
Dumped at 22.30pm by a man in a van

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate graffiti daubed on bus stop signage, 20th May
item.description:
Inappropriate graffiti daubed on bus stop signage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting in Eynsford Close, Petts Wood, 20th May
item.description:
Advertising hoarding has been nailed to a tree in Eynsford Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive grafitti on the fence, 20th May
item.description:
Previously reported via Android in the Graffiti category anonymously at 23:21, Monday, FixMyStreet ref: 9473349 yet closed for being unable to find the grafitti in question. Maybe a closer look was required.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Curtismill Way, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working very dark, 20th May
item.description:
Street lights not working, large tree needs cutting keeps braking this light

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marden Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest Bikes blocking pavement in front of resident homes!, 20th May
item.description:
5/6 Forest Bikes blocking pavement in front of resident homes! REMOVAL OF THESE BIKES are required! When are they going to be removed and for users to stop leaving them here!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54-62, Boleyn Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 51 Maury garage, 20th May
item.description:
Misc household items and fence panel left on the street. Address label clearly identifies this as rubbish from 46B Maury. This is a frequent flytipping spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laughing gas canisters dumped on Wrottesley Road, 20th May
item.description:
Someone’s had a mad half hour with a couple boxes of laughing gas and dumped the canisters and boxes on Wrottesley Road, opposite number 2. Photos taken 20th May 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Put lids on circular bins on Haggerston road, 20th May
item.description:
The round bins here and nearby have no lids, and so rubbish often ends up blowing around and out of the bins due to wind. This ends up with the road having a lot of rubbish on it every day. This would be solved by the bins having lids.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haggerston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow lines non existent, 20th May
item.description:
The yellow lines in crescent drive (between Lakeswood road and Chesham Ave) has completely disappeared as you can see in the photos provided. We have a no parking sign between 8-10am but it’s a bit pointless as there are no yellow lines so cars park there at all times. Please repaint asap as this is the 4th time in 3 years that it’s been reported.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gedling House East Dulwich estate, 20th May
item.description:
We found the house hold near the bin dump in the corner main enterance of Gedling house. East Dulwich estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severe health hazard from bins, 20th May
item.description:
90 Whiston Road.Our bins have not been collected in 5+ weeks. Some bags were removed from the floor but the contents of the large bins remain full. The room, surrounding building, and inside the lobby have become infested with flies and rats at the door.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green bin left out on pavement blocking it since 13/05/2026, 20th May
item.description:
Green bin has been left out on footpath for over a week blocking it at the narrowest point. A wheelchair user would have to go onto the road to get around it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Holbeach Gardens, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in the courtyard, 20th May
item.description:
We have a dead fox in the courtyard (Jubilee yard, in front of the entrance to the pyramid building in the courtyard) since sunday. I reported it already, but no one has removed it. Please send someone to remove it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Queen Elizabeth Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
